note: Ohio expanded Medicaid. Adults up to 138% FPL qualify. Ohio Works First is the state TANF program.

programs.name: SNAP (Ohio)
programs.description: Ohio administers federal SNAP (called Food Assistance in Ohio). Apply through the Ohio Benefits portal.

application.where: benefits.ohio.gov or local County Department of Job and Family Services

programs.name: Ohio Medicaid
programs.description: Ohio expanded Medicaid covers adults up to 138% FPL. Children covered up to 206% FPL. No premium for most enrollees.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No premium for most enrollees. Full health coverage.

income.note: Ohio expanded Medicaid — adults up to 138% FPL qualify.

programs.name: Ohio Works First (TANF)
programs.full_name: Ohio Works First — Temporary Assistance for Needy Families
programs.description: Ohio's TANF program provides monthly cash assistance to families with children under 18. A family of 3 can receive up to approximately $514/month.

eligibility_rules.who: Families with children under 18 (or 19 if full-time student)

income.note: Income and work participation requirements apply

application.where: benefits.ohio.gov or local County JFS office
